Dining Events Events calendar Event rooms Private events Above & Below About History Restoration Pierson Gallery Photo gallery Duckpin bowling Community Membership Reciprocal Clubs Visit

Founded February 8, 1869 — New London, Connecticut

Events

Calendar, entertainment, and the reasons members return throughout the year.

Address290 State Street
New London, CT 06320
LunchWed BYO · 12–2 pm
DinnerThursdays · 5 pm
Contact959-264-2733
thamesclub.nl@gmail.com
Calendar & Entertainment

What's coming

Members receive the full calendar. These are the events that make the Club worth belonging to.

First Friday · Oct 3, 2025
Oktoberfest

Pretzels, steins, and the whole room. An annual fall tradition.

March 17 · Annual
St. Patrick's Day

Traditional Irish feast. The Murthas perform and sing. $65 pp.

Friday · Seasonal
Flamenco Night

Tapas & Sangria. Live flamenco at the Club. $50++.

November 9 · Annual
Bowling Banquet

End-of-season celebration for the duckpin league. Awards and dinner.

December 31 · Annual
New Year's Eve

Veuve Clicquot, champagne tower, dancing, the whole room dressed for it.

Summer · Series
Jazz Series

The Leigh & Hunter Jazz Trio with special guests. $10 cover. Bar opens 5:30.

Annual · Yale Tradition
The Whiffenpoofs

Yale's a cappella group performs to a packed house. One of the Club's most anticipated evenings.

Annual · Members
Think Red Luncheon

An annual Club tradition. Pink carnations, wine, good company.

Regular Entertainment

Jennifer C.
Vocalist · Fridays

Live music Fridays at the Club. Jennifer's voice fills the dining room.

Young Harpist
Harp · Special Events

String Quartet
Chamber Music · Valentine's

Four musicians in the hunt room, fireplace lit, Audubon above the mantle. A Valentine's tradition.

Weekly Schedule
Wednesdays · NoonBring Your LunchBYO
Thursdays · 5 pmClub DinnerServed
Tue / Wed / Thu · 5:30Duckpin BowlingLeague

The dining room and private rooms are available for gatherings, dinners, and receptions. Catering arranged through the Club.
